name: private_holdout_v1
description: Operator-private holdout (Phase 4.8-C). Schema only is committed; case contents stay local. See README.md for the case shape and the gitignore protocol.
notes: Manifest skeleton. Once `cases/` is populated locally, regenerate the actual `manifest.json` (same shape as datasets/calibration_v1/manifest.json) and keep it gitignored alongside the cases. This `manifest.example.json` IS committed and serves as the schema contract.
rules: ADR-32: no raw prompt/response artifact by default
ADR-33: --store-redacted-provider-io is opt-in and redacts inside the provider
Cases never enter the public repo; only the README + this example manifest are committed
